title: Southern Cape youth: Write a book, get published, win big!
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - If you are between 12 to...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - If you are between 12 to 21 years of age and live in the Southern Cape, then here is your chance to have a book that you have written, published and win a cash prize!


> The deadline to submit your book is 1 May.


Berenicegroup Incorporated and Gemini Model and Talent Agency are offering this opportunity.

Gemini, owned by Frieda van der Walt, operates in the Garden Route area and has a number of actors on its books.

Berenice Kogana, who owns Berenicegroup, is a published author and a coach of book writers.


> Your story must be a maximum of 3 000 words and address issues relevant to the youth and offer a solution.


It can be in English or Afrikaans.

The prizes include the publication of your written work as an eBook, a live performance of your story by Gemini Model and Talent Agency actors, coaching in book writing and a cash prize.


> Your book must be in an A5 Word document format. Email your document to [email protected] or WhatsApp it to 082 559 9389.


The winner will be announced on Youth Day, 16 June.

Berenice Kogana

Frieda van der Walt.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
